MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-24-2004 IN DEPT. 206, DEFENDANT DICOTA USA, LLP'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/18/05 IS CONTINUED TO 5/9/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE CURRENT MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED. A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT ORDERED DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL'S DECLARATION UNDER SEAL-WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. NEW COUNSEL SHOULD BE PREPARED TO PROCEED ON NEW TRIAL DATE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. HAKEWILL; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, (206)
